ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "watts" REAL /* Energy consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Identifier for the measurement (e.g., ranging, normal) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., smart meter, sensor, IoT device) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, CSV, XML) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., every 5 minutes, hourly) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_data_source_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., smart meter, sensor, IoT device) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "source_model" TEXT /* Model of the data source */,
  "source_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the data source */,
  "source_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the data source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement type (e.g., W, V, A, PF) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the measurement type (e.g., electrical, thermal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the measurement */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "data_source_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_metadata_data_source_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, end-user) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data point */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, error) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data point triggering the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold breach, anomaly detection) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "threshold_status" TEXT /* Status of the threshold (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_detection" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly detection setting */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "anomaly_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for anomaly detection */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly detection setting */,
  "anomaly_status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly detection setting (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_detection_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasting" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Predicted energy value */,
  "forecast_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast */,
  "forecast_status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast (e.g., generated, pending, error) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasting_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the forecasting model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
